title: Placement
description: A Campaign Manager 360 placement. Placements represent ad inventory on publisher sites and define the size, format, pricing, and location where ads can be served.

campaignId.description: Campaign ID of this placement. Required on insert.

name.description: Name of this placement. Must be fewer than 512 characters.

siteId.description: Site ID associated with this placement. Required on insert, read-only after.

directorySiteId.description: Directory site ID of this placement. Required on insert, read-only after.

keyName.description: Key name of this placement, auto-generated from the name.

placementGroupId.description: ID of the placement group this placement belongs to.

additionalSizes.description: Additional sizes associated with this placement.

tagFormats.description: Tag formats to generate for this placement.

paymentSource.description: Payment source for this placement. Read-only after insert.

paymentApproved.description: Whether payment was approved for this placement. Read-only for non-publisher-paid placements.

activeStatus.description: Whether this placement is active, inactive, archived, or permanently archived.

contentCategoryId.description: ID of the content category assigned to this placement.

placementStrategyId.description: ID of the placement strategy assigned to this placement.

primary.description: Whether this placement is the primary placement in a roadblock.

sslRequired.description: Whether creatives assigned to this placement must be SSL-compliant.

adBlockingOptOut.description: Whether this placement opts out of ad blocking.

wrappingOptOut.description: Whether this placement opts out of tag wrapping.

videoActiveViewOptOut.description: Whether Verification and ActiveView for in-stream video creatives are disabled for this placement.

vpaidAdapterChoice.description: VPAID adapter setting for this placement.

kind.description: Identifies what kind of resource this is. Value is always dfareporting#placement.
